Terms

Terms of Use

By using Lucky Number Guide, you agree to treat the content as general information, cultural education, product research, or personal reflection rather than professional advice.

No professional advice

Tools, cultural readings, product guides, and articles do not provide medical, legal, financial, safety, or professional advice. Decisions should be made with appropriate professional support when needed.

Content accuracy

We try to keep content useful and current, but cultural practices, product availability, prices, and third-party policies can change. Visitors should verify important details before buying products or relying on any guide.

Articles, tools, and product notes may simplify a topic for readability. That does not mean every region, family, school, interpretation, or product case is identical. Readers should use the page as a structured starting point and compare details with their own situation.

Products, ads, and paid offers

The site may include ads, affiliate links, digital products, paid reports, or service offers. Product links and paid offers must be evaluated by the visitor before purchase. Checkout, refund, and delivery terms may be presented at purchase when paid offers are available.

User responsibility

Visitors are responsible for how they use the information on this site. Do not use a tool result, cultural reading, gift suggestion, ceremony note, or product comparison as the only basis for a major personal, financial, legal, health, or safety decision.

Contact

For questions about these terms, contact guan@shanyuegroup.com.
